title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that understands genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery and design. It reportedly outperforms AlphaFold 3 at predicting drug toxicity, designing new drugs, and discovering antibodies and cancer therapeutics.
